queries.query: Perform a deep project-wide health pass and fix any core reliability problems you find.
Can you audit this repo end to end, run lint/typecheck/tests/build, and repair deployment blockers?
Do a repo health check. Prioritize P0/P1/P2 issues and avoid broad refactors.
Find why CI is failing across the project and fix the underlying reliability issues.
Sweep the codebase for silent failures, broken scripts, and test/build blockers, then fix safe ones.
Map the whole stack, run the native checks, and give me a severity-ranked reliability report.
Run the self-improving project health pass, read previous .agent_memory.json lessons, and fix safe P0-P2 issues.
Run project-health-pass in audit-only mode and produce stable HP-* findings without editing files.
Compare this health pass against the previous JSON report and show the baseline diff.
Fix verified repo reliability issues and emit a machine-readable project-health-pass report.
Run an audit-only repo health pass with evidence coverage and mark unknown surfaces explicitly.
Counter-review serious P0/P1 findings and build a safest-first remediation backlog.
Review this one function for readability.
Add a button to the dashboard using the existing styles.
Explain how authentication works in this repo.
Write a README section for the install command.
Fix the typo in the login page copy.
Run npm test and tell me the output.
